verdicts.note: Zero denotes genuinely mixed pole evidence, not unknown duration or level; the dossier does not support a directional placement.
His elected hospital-board, investigative, business, and agency-management record is relevant institutional experience, balanced by the absence of sheriff-office command.

review_notes: All five authored pairs were reviewed. Garcia and Eastham have direct office records; Eastham explicitly combines trafficker enforcement with treatment. Podesta's unknown experience level cannot be encoded as zero, while Byrd's mixed inside/outside profile warrants zero rather than an outsider score.
